decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: format_duration includes only the non-zero h/m/s components in order, AND returns '0s' for an input of 0 (not an empty string), e.g. 3661 -> '1h 1m 1s', 60 -> '1m', 0 -> '0s'.
The change modifies only the module and adds no dependency.

weighted.criterion: It omits zero components but special-cases the all-zero input to '0s', rather than returning '' for 0 or always printing all three components.
